nasb.text: Then it will be when you have seized the city, that you shall set the city on fire. You shall do it according to the word of the Lord. See, I have commanded you.”

esv.text: And as soon as you have taken the city, you shall set the city on fire. You shall do according to the word of the Lord. See, I have commanded you.”

cnv.text: 你們佔領了城以後，就要放火燒城；要照著耶和華的話行事；你們要謹慎，我已經吩咐你們了。”

ccb.text: 你们攻陷艾城以后，要照耶和华的话放火焚城。这是我的命令。”
